pw.t: abbr. 女警（policewoman）；现在价值（present worth）；电动窗（power window）

pwa.t: abbr. Pacific Western Airlines 太平洋西部航空公司

pwas.t: (pwa 的复数) abbr. Pacific Western Airlines 太平洋西部航空公司

pwb.t: abbr. printed wiring board 印刷线路板，印制布线板，印制电路板

pwc.t: abbr. 印刷线路卡（Printed Wiring Card）

pwds.t: abbr. post-weaning diarrhea syndrome 断奶后腹泻综合征; Protected Wireline Distribution System 电线防护分发系统

pwe.t: abbr. pulse-width encoder 脉宽编码器; 脉宽译码器; pulse-width encoding 脉宽编码

pwg.t: abbr. programme working group 方案工作组; Permanent Working Group 永久的工作组（北大西洋公约组织）; preparatory working group 预备工作组; Province Working Group 省的工作团

pwh.t: abbr. precision welding head 精密焊头

pwl.t: abbr. 能级（Power Level）；功率瓦特级（Power Watt Level）；电平

pwn.t: abbr. 脉宽调制（pulse width modification）；多形核白细胞；松材线虫

pwo.t: abbr. Public Work Office(r) 公共工程局（官员）; Public Works Officer 市政工程官员; public works office 市政工程处; Public Welfare Office(r) 公共福利局（官员）

pwp.t: abbr. picowatt power 百亿分之一瓦功率

pwr.t: abbr. 加压水冷却反应堆（Pressurized Water Reactor）
pwr.d: n a nuclear reactor that uses water as a coolant and moderator; the steam produced can drive a steam turbine

pwrs.t: (pwr 的复数) abbr. 加压水冷却反应堆（Pressurized Water Reactor）
pwrs.d:
plural of pwr
n a nuclear reactor that uses water as a coolant and moderator; the steam produced can drive a steam turbine

pws.t: [医][=pickwickian syndrome]皮克韦坎（氏）综合征：肺泡换气低下肥胖综合征

pwt.t: abbr. Bremerton, Washington 美国; pulse width threshold 脉冲宽度阈; Pacific War Time 太平洋战争时期; pulse wave technology 脉冲波技术
